metadata.sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AC 2026-06-02: GreeceDestination directly supports Bouros/Vouros identity east of Andros near Grias to Pidima, sea access or difficult dirt-road access from Kochylos, sand/pebble terrain, deserted/unorganized character, local water context, and mask/spearfishing/sea-cave interest; e-Kyklades lists Bouro with the nearby Vintzi/Ayia Ekaterini/Melissa small-beach cave group, GTP lists Bouros among Ormos Korthiou area beaches, and OSM way 977492388 directly supports the current beach identity/location. Source meltemi/exposure/trash wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claims.
